I-476 South to close, from Sunday, April 19 at 12:00 am through 5:00 am. Between the Lehigh Valley exit 56 and the Quakertown exit 44.
Detour Information
Take US 22 East to PA 309 South to I-78 East to PA 309 South to PA 663 South. This will bring you to the Quakertown Interchange (44)

I-276 East to close, from Sunday, April 19 at 12:00 am through 5:00 am.
